location: Reward for defeating the Full-Grown Fallingstar Beast, an optional boss in a large crater south of the Ninth Mt. Gelmir Campsite Site of Grace; reach the crater by spiritspring jump or the ladder down the mountainside.
tactics: The beast is a large gravity-wielding creature with a heavy pounce/slam and ranged gravity magic — keep moving and use the crater's open space
It has a sizable health pool for an open-world boss, so come prepared for a long fight
The weapon's own Gravity Bolt skill is noted to work especially well against the Stonedigger Troll boss later in Old Altus Tunnel, if you already have it by then
lore: Fashioned from a shard of a Fallingstar Beast's jaw — creatures said to have fallen from the sky — the weapon retains a trace of that meteoric power, letting its wielder call down crashing bolts of gravity magic.

builds.name: Strength/Dex hybrid with a light Int dip
builds.why: D/D physical scaling carries the melee side, while a small Intelligence investment strengthens the innate Gravity Bolt skill for a gravity-magic themed build.
